---
name: Broken API Endpoint
about: A dashboard card stopped working due to a Microsoft Graph API change
title: '[BROKEN API] '
labels: broken-api

---

**Which page and card is affected?**
e.g. Identity page → Risk Detections card

**What error is shown on screen?**
e.g. 403 Forbidden / 404 Not Found / blank card

**When did it stop working?**
Approximate date:

**Graph endpoint involved (if known):**
e.g. `/v1.0/identityProtection/riskDetections`

**Link to Microsoft changelog (if you found it):**
https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/changelog

**Your tenant license (helps narrow down the issue):**
- [ ] Microsoft 365 Business Premium
- [ ] Microsoft 365 E3
- [ ] Microsoft 365 E5
- [ ] Other:
